title: Ovarian cyst follow-up

examination.text: Specifies pain pattern, menstrual, bladder, bowel, movement, posture, function and medication history plus abdominal and pelvic examination for focal tenderness or structural findings.
examination.rationale: Supports entered pelvic-pain history and clinician-performed examination in a chronic non-pregnancy context.
examination.evidence_extract: Specifies pain pattern, menstrual, bladder, bowel, movement, posture, function and medication history plus abdominal and pelvic examination for focal tenderness or structural findings.

source.title: The Initial Management of Chronic Pelvic Pain — Green-top Guideline No. 41

investigations.text: Supports clinician-selected STI sampling when PID is suspected and transvaginal ultrasound for adnexal masses and selected chronic pelvic-pain pathology.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinician-reviewed pelvic imaging context without interpreting cyst morphology.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-selected STI sampling when PID is suspected and transvaginal ultrasound for adnexal masses and selected chronic pelvic-pain pathology.

source.title: The Initial Management of Chronic Pelvic Pain — Green-top Guideline No. 41

exact_section.heading: 6.1 Screening for Infection; 6.2 Transvaginal Scanning and MRI

source_limitations: Age, pregnancy, cyst type, size, morphology, laterality, symptoms, tumour markers and prior plan are absent.
No benignity, malignancy risk, repeat imaging interval, surgery or referral is generated.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
